confirm.question: Are you sure you want to save this change?

errors.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
errors.missingPermission: You need the **Manage Server** permission to manage another member's birthday.
errors.invalidDate: That date doesn't exist. Double-check the day for the month you selected.

member.description: Member to register the birthday for — requires Manage Server

alreadyExists.self: You already have a birthday saved. Use `/birthday update` to change it.
alreadyExists.other: A birthday is already saved for this member. Use `/birthday update` to change it.

registered.self: 🎂 Your birthday has been saved for **{{date}}** — {{timeUntil}}!

member.description: Member whose birthday to update — requires Manage Server

notFound.self: You don't have a birthday saved yet. Use `/birthday register` first.
notFound.other: No birthday found for this member. Use `/birthday register` first.

member.description: Member whose birthday to remove — requires Manage Server

notFound.self: You don't have a birthday saved.
notFound.other: No birthday is saved for this member.

member.description: Member to look up (leave empty to see your own)

notFound.self: You haven't saved your birthday yet.
notFound.other: This member hasn't saved their birthday yet.

dateWithAge.self: 🎂 Your birthday is on **{{date}}** — you'll be turning **{{age}}** {{timeUntil}}! 🎉
dateWithAge.other: 🎂 <@{{userId}}>'s birthday is on **{{date}}** — they'll be turning **{{age}}** {{timeUntil}}! 🎉

member.description: Member to use in the test announcement (leave empty to use yourself)

responses.missingPermission: You need the **Manage Server** permission to use this test command.
responses.missingAnnouncementChannel: Configure an announcement channel first with `/config announcement-channel`.
responses.channelUnavailable: I can't access the configured announcement channel right now.
